name: HTTP Request
description: Complete HTTP client with GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE and response events

blocks.name: HTTP GET
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; let headersObj = {}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const onSuccess = ${b.getValue('onSuccess') || 'null'}; const onError = ${b.getValue('onError') || 'null'}; fetch(url, { method: 'GET', headers: headersObj }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; if (onSuccess && typeof onSuccess === 'function') onSuccess(data); }).catch(e => { if (onError && typeof onError === 'function') onError(e); else console.error('HTTP GET failed:', e); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP POST
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const onSuccess = ${b.getValue('onSuccess') || 'null'}; const onError = ${b.getValue('onError') || 'null'}; fetch(url, { method: 'POST', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; if (onSuccess && typeof onSuccess === 'function') onSuccess(data); }).catch(e => { if (onError && typeof onError === 'function') onError(e); else console.error('HTTP POST failed:', e); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP PUT
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const onSuccess = ${b.getValue('onSuccess') || 'null'}; const onError = ${b.getValue('onError') || 'null'}; fetch(url, { method: 'PUT', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; if (onSuccess && typeof onSuccess === 'function') onSuccess(data); }).catch(e => { if (onError && typeof onError === 'function') onError(e); else console.error('HTTP PUT failed:', e); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP PATCH
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; let headersObj = {}; let bodyObj = ${b.getValue('body')}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const onSuccess = ${b.getValue('onSuccess') || 'null'}; const onError = ${b.getValue('onError') || 'null'}; fetch(url, { method: 'PATCH', headers: headersObj, body: JSON.stringify(bodyObj) }).then(r => { if (!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.json(); }).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; if (onSuccess && typeof onSuccess === 'function') onSuccess(data); }).catch(e => { if (onError && typeof onError === 'function') onError(e); else console.error('HTTP PATCH failed:', e); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP DELETE
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const url = '${b.getValue('url')}'; let headersObj = {}; try { headersObj = ${b.getValue('headers')}; } catch(e) { console.error('Invalid headers:', e); } const onSuccess = ${b.getValue('onSuccess') || 'null'}; const onError = ${b.getValue('onError') || 'null'}; fetch(url, { method: 'DELETE', headers: headersObj }).then(r => { if (!r.ok && r.status !== 204) throw new Error('HTTP ' + r.status); return r.status === 204 ? {} : r.json(); }).then(data => { window['${b.getValue('target')}'] = data; if (onSuccess && typeof onSuccess === 'function') onSuccess(data); }).catch(e => { if (onError && typeof onError === 'function') onError(e); else console.error('HTTP DELETE failed:', e); }); })();`

blocks.name: HTTP Event Listener
blocks.exportCode: `(function() { const eventType = '${b.getValue('eventType')}'; const callback = ${b.getValue('callback')}; const targetVar = '${b.getValue('targetVar')}'; window.__httpEvents = window.__httpEvents || []; window.__httpEvents.push({ type: eventType, callback: callback, target: targetVar }); if (eventType === 'complete') { console.log('HTTP Event listener registered for:', eventType); } })();`
